Frequently Asked Questions

Is there a free trial for Pro?

Yes! Pro comes with a 7-day free trial. Cancel anytime, no questions asked.

What payment methods do you accept?

UPI, credit/debit cards, net banking, and EMI options via Razorpay.

Can I switch plans anytime?

Yes, upgrade or downgrade anytime. Changes apply from the next billing cycle.

What is the 99%ile guarantee?

Elite users who follow our plan and take 10+ mocks are guaranteed support until they achieve 99+ or get a full refund.
